  • Uses of Cruise in controller

    Methods in controller that return Cruise
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Cruise
    LoginController.getCruiseByCode(String id)
    Retrieves a cruise by calling the getCruiseByCode method of the CruiseDAO implementation with the provided id and returns it.
    Methods in controller that return types with arguments of type Cruise
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Cruise>
    LoginController.getAllCruise()
    Retrieves a list of all cruises by calling the getAllCruise method of the CruiseDAO implementation and returns it.
    Methods in controller with parameters of type Cruise
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    LoginController.insertCruise(Cruise cruise)
    Inserts a new cruise by calling the insertCruise method of the CruiseDAO implementation with the provided cruise object and returns the result.
    boolean
    LoginController.updateCruiseByCode(Cruise cruise)
    Updates a cruise by calling the updateCruiseByCode method of the CruiseDAO implementation with the provided cruise object and returns the result.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Cruise>
    CruiseDAO.getAllCruise()
    Retrieves a list of all cruises by calling the getAllCruise method of the
    List<Cruise>
    DBImplementationCruise.getAllCruise()
    This method retrieves all cruises from the database by executing the SQLSELECTALL query and returns a list of Cruise objects representing the retrieved cruises.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    CruiseDAO.insertCruise(Cruise cruise)

    DBImplementationCruise.insertCruise(Cruise cruise)
    This method inserts a new cruise into the database based on the provided Cruise object.

    boolean
    DBImplementationCruise.updateCruiseByCode(Cruise cruise)
    This method updates the information of a cruise in the database based on the provided Cruise object.
    Constructors in model with parameters of type Cruise
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Worker(String idWorker, TypeWorker service, String name, String surname, Date hiringDate, String phoneNumber, String email, int age, boolean spanish, boolean english, Cruise cruise)
    Constructor for the Worker class that initializes all attributes of a worker, including their unique identifier, type of service, name, surname, hiring date, contact information, age, language skills, and associated cruise.
